landing.heroSubtitle2: Interactive courses, on-chain credentials, open source.
landing.featureCodeDesc: Write Rust, Anchor, and TypeScript directly in your browser. Real challenges with automated test cases — no local setup needed.
landing.featureCertsDesc: Earn NFT certificates minted on Solana when you complete a course. Verifiable, shareable, and yours forever.
landing.featureXpDesc: Earn XP for every lesson, keep your streak alive, and climb the leaderboard. Learning should feel like leveling up.
landing.featureOssDesc: Built by Superteam Brasil, open to everyone. Fork it, extend it, make it yours.

courses.catalogSubtitle: Explore our courses and start building on Solana
